title: Knowledge
description: Manage your knowledge packs, shareable across AI assistants

upload.title: Drag files here, or click to select
upload.description: Supports PDF, Word, TXT, images, and other common formats. Max 50 MB per file.
upload.defaultMessage: Drag files here or click the button to select

form.title: Create Knowledge Pack

itemTable.caption: File Table
